top_signals.title: Autonomous drone startup Quantum Systems raises $1.2 billion as investors pile into defense

top_signals.title: Led by Buc-ee’s and new rival Dolly Parton, America’s gas station chains are in a mega-sizing era
top_signals.summary: Gas station chains led by Buc-ee's are coming closer to rivaling America's big box stores in size, and Dolly Parton is getting in on the retail trend.

top_signals.title: Chanel Buys Charvet, Maker of $750 Shirts Favored by Churchill
top_signals.summary: Chanel agreed to buy Charvet, the oldest shirtmaker in France that once counted Winston Churchill among its clients and whose striped linen shirts typically go for about €655 ($746).
